meta.name: Superteam Academy Design System
meta.changelog: v2.1 adds complete route-level design specs for all 10 student pages. v2.0 added student/admin dashboard tokens. v1.0 established core brand system.
meta.llm_instruction: This is the single source of truth for every UI surface of Superteam Academy — landing page, student dashboard, and admin dashboard. Never introduce colors, fonts, spacing, or patterns outside this file. When in doubt, refer here first.

brand.name: Superteam Academy
brand.tagline: The fastest path from curious to building on Solana.
brand.tone: Confident mentor in a forest cabin — not a SaaS startup, not Wall Street. Warm but authoritative.
brand.audience: Web3 developers, blockchain learners, Solana ecosystem builders

colors._rule: 60% cream backgrounds · 30% greens for structure and actions · 5% amber for highlights only · 5% charcoal for text. Never introduce any color outside this palette.

cream.role: Primary page background, card fills, modal backgrounds

cream_dark.role: Alt section backgrounds, dividers, input fills

cream_deeper.role: Pressed states, deeper alternates, chart fills

green_primary.role: Primary CTAs, links, active states, progress bars, focus rings

green_secondary.role: Navbar, sidebar, dark hero sections, card header backgrounds

green_dark.role: Sidebar collapsed, deep dark panels, footer

green_mint.role: Gradient fills, active sidebar indicator, success accents

green_mint_soft.role: Muted success, level 3 badge, soft highlights

amber.role: Badges, XP earned, streak indicator, featured ribbons. MAX 5% per screen.

amber_dark.role: Amber hover states, gradient pair for amber button

charcoal.role: Primary text, icon strokes, dark surface base

gradients.dark_section: radial-gradient(circle at 70% 50%, rgba(0,140,76,0.3) 0%, transparent 55%), repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent, transparent 40px, rgba(247,234,203,0.03) 40px, rgba(247,234,203,0.03) 41px)

typography._rule: Playfair Display for ALL headings and display moments. DM Sans for ALL UI, body, labels, and buttons. Never substitute. Never mix within a single element.

label_md.use: Form labels, nav links, button text (md/lg)

overline.use: Section eyebrows, badge text, table headers, sidebar section labels

code.use: Code blocks, wallet addresses, tx hashes

spacing._rule: 4px base unit. Always use multiples of 4. Never use odd numbers like 7px or 13px.

animation._rule: Transitions default to 0.2s. Cards use spring easing. Never animate layout properties. Always include prefers-reduced-motion fallback.

keyframes.fade_up: from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px) } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) }

components._rule: Build every component exactly to these specs. Variant names are canonical — use them in code comments and class names.

stat._note: Dashboard KPI card — icon + number + label + optional trend

activity._note: Timeline/feed item with colored left border

empty_state._note: Always: SVG illustration + title + body + optional CTA button

icons._rule: Lucide React library only. Stroke-only (never filled). strokeWidth 1.5 standard, 2 for emphasis. Never use emoji as UI icons.

dot_grid.use: Card header dark panels, hero card backgrounds

diagonal_lines.use: Dark section backgrounds — add over solid color for depth

aurora_bg.description: 3 animated radial blobs layered at different opacities and positions for the hero background

noise_overlay.use: Large dark surface backgrounds for organic texture

sidebar._rule: Used in BOTH student and admin dashboards. Same structural spec, same colors. Sidebar content (nav items) differs per surface.

student_dashboard._description: Motivating, personal, progress-forward. The student should feel momentum and achievement at every glance.

welcome_banner._note: Personalized greeting. Dark green + aurora. Shows name, level badge, streak badge.

stat_card._note: 4 stats: XP Total · Lessons Completed · Current Streak · Rank

active_path_card._note: Currently active path. Left green border. Shows path title, current module, progress bar, next CTA.

streak_tracker._note: 7-day calendar grid. Shows consistency at a glance.

xp_level_bar._note: Full-width XP progress toward next level. Milestone dots in amber.

achievement_feed._note: Last 3 earned credentials. Newest has amber glow.

upcoming_challenge._note: Next live challenge with countdown timer.

course_player._note: Full-screen lesson view. Sidebar tree left, content right.

profile_page.credential_grid: 3 cols on desktop, card.variants.on_dark, amber border on hover

admin_dashboard._description: Data-dense, authoritative, in control. Cream backgrounds with white cards. Same sidebar as student but darker feeling via data density.

charts._note: All charts use the palette below in order. Never deviate.

user_table._note: Full user management. Row click → detail drawer.

accessibility._rule: All text must pass WCAG AA. All interactive elements must have visible focus states. Minimum 44px touch targets.

failing_avoid.reason: Mint on dark green — borderline, avoid for text

accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap aurora, float, scan animations in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)

do: Use #f7eacb as the dominant background at ~60% visual coverage
Use #008c4c for every primary CTA button
Use #2f6b3f for sidebars, navbars, dark card tops, and dark sections
Use #ffd23f only for badges, XP earned, streak flames, and featured ribbons — max 1-2 instances per screen
Use Playfair Display for ALL headings, stat numbers, and the logo — nothing else
Use DM Sans for ALL UI text — buttons, labels, table cells, nav, body copy
Apply translateY(-5px) hover transform to interactive cards
Use the sidebar active indicator: 3px solid #52dda0 left border
Show XP numbers in Playfair Display 900 weight
Use lucide-react icons with strokeWidth 1.5 throughout
Apply dot-grid texture to dark card header panels
Use white (#ffffff) cards on cream backgrounds to create visual hierarchy
dont: Never introduce any color outside the defined palette — no blue, purple, pink, or other greens
Never use Inter, Roboto, or system fonts
Never use emoji as UI icons — always use Lucide SVG icons
Never put amber as a large background section color
Never put #008c4c text on #2f6b3f background — both are dark greens, fails contrast
Never set CSS custom properties (--var) inside React inline style objects
Never use 'continue' as a JavaScript object key — it is a reserved word
Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white unless it is a card surface
Never exceed 5% amber coverage on any screen
Never put dark text directly on the sidebar dark green without checking contrast
Never mix Playfair Display and DM Sans within a single text element

routes._description: Complete route-level design spec for all 10 student-facing pages. Each entry defines layout, key components, color application, and interaction patterns. Cross-reference component specs in 'components' and tokens in 'colors.semantic'.

landing.nav: transparent_to_frosted — starts transparent, gains backdrop-blur + rgba(22,50,30,0.92) on scroll

hero.layout: two_column — text left (55%), UI card right (45%)

text_side.eyebrow_badge: badge amber pill — '⬡ The #1 Solana Education Platform' with pulse dot
text_side.headline: typography.scale.hero_xl, colors.text.on_dark — 'Your Path to [mint underline: Building] on Solana'
text_side.headline_accent_word: color #52dda0, wavy SVG underline in same color
text_side.ctas: row gap-14 — [primary btn lg 'Start Learning →'] [ghost_dark btn lg 'Explore Courses']
text_side.stats_row: 4 stats separated by 1px rgba(247,234,203,0.08) hairlines — value in display font, label in overline muted

card_side.top_bar: macOS dots + path label + menu lines
card_side.content: trending path badge + course title + progress bar + 4 module rows with state indicators
card_side.floating_xp_badge: position bottom-right, amber gradient bg, Playfair Display number, '+350 XP / Just earned' overline
card_side.floating_streak: position mid-left, glass dark card, flame SVG icon in amber, '14-day streak'
card_side.live_count: position top-right, pulsing mint dot + '1,204 learning now' label

social_proof_bar.content: 'Trusted by teams at' label + 1px divider + infinite marquee of partner logos
social_proof_bar.partner_chip: background rgba(27,35,29,0.06), border light, abbr badge in secondary green, name in body_sm secondary

learning_paths.layout: section header left + 'Explore All' btn right + 3-col card grid
learning_paths.card: components.card.variants.featured for middle card, default for others
learning_paths.card_header: background green_secondary, dot_grid texture, level dots + tag badge + SVG icon + title + desc + stat row
learning_paths.card_body: white bg, curriculum label, ProgressModule list, conditional progress bar, full-width CTA btn

features.feature_cell: SVG icon (FeatureSVGs) + numbered accent + title display_sm + desc body_sm on_dark_muted + meta overline

testimonials.layout: header left (rating + stars right) + 3-col card grid
testimonials.card: card.variants.default, middle card uses card.variants.on_dark (dark featured)

footer.brand_col: logo + tagline + newsletter input group + 4 social icon btns (X, Discord, GitHub, YouTube)
footer.newsletter: dark input + primary green subscribe button
footer.link_cols: overline heading + list of text links in on_dark_muted
footer.bottom_bar: copyright left + green pulsing status dot right

search_bar.style: components.input.on_dark variant, pill border-radius, search icon left, keyboard shortcut badge right

filter_chips.style: pill badge variant ghost_light — inactive: neutral badge, active: primary green filled

filter_bar.sort_dropdown: ghost_light btn sm + dropdown component right-aligned

learning_paths_row.label: overline 'Curated Learning Paths'
learning_paths_row.layout: horizontal scroll row of 3 path cards on desktop, scrollable on mobile
learning_paths_row.path_card: card.variants.featured — dark header (green_secondary) + white body, same spec as landing page learning_paths cards

card.difficulty_badge: positioned top-right on thumbnail — beginner/intermediate/advanced badge variant
card.title: typography.scale.card_title charcoal
card.meta_row: icon + text pairs: clock (duration), book (lessons), star (XP) — body_xs muted
card.instructor_row: avatar xs + name body_sm + verified mint badge if applicable
card.progress_bar: shown only if enrolled — components.progress_bar with percentage label
card.footer: border-top colors.borders.light, padding-top 14px — [difficulty badge] [enroll/continue btn sm]

empty_state.title: 'No courses match your filters'
empty_state.body: 'Try adjusting the difficulty or topic filters'

course_header.layout: two_column — meta left (60%) + enrollment card right (40%)

left_side.title: typography.scale.section_lg on_dark
left_side.meta_row: 4 items with Lucide icons: duration, lessons, enrolled count, XP reward — on_dark_muted body_sm
left_side.instructor: avatar md + name label_md on_dark + role body_sm on_dark_dim + verified badge

right_side.xp_highlight: large Playfair stat_number amber + 'XP to earn' overline on_dark_dim
right_side.progress_section: shown if enrolled — progress bar + '% complete' label + 'Continue' primary btn
right_side.enroll_section: shown if not enrolled — 'Free Forever' pill badge + primary btn lg 'Enroll Now' + ghost_dark btn 'Preview'
right_side.includes_list: checklist items with mint checkmark SVG — e.g. '22 lessons', 'Certificate on completion', 'Lifetime access'

content_side.what_youll_learn: card.variants.default, 2-col list with mint checkmark icons

module_accordion.module_header: background rgba(27,35,29,0.03), border-bottom light, padding 16px 20px — expand chevron + module title + lesson count + duration

lesson_row.icon_active: ring 1.5px green_primary + small filled dot center
lesson_row.meta: body_xs muted — duration + lesson type badge (Video / Code / Quiz)

content_side.reviews: card.variants.default, star rating summary + 3 static review cards

sticky_sidebar.content: course thumbnail + xp reward + enroll/continue btn + includes list

header.left: back arrow + course title (on_dark_muted) + '/' + lesson title (on_dark)
header.center: progress bar 5px — track rgba(247,234,203,0.2), fill linear-gradient(90deg,#008c4c,#52dda0) — with '12/22 lessons' label
header.right: XP pill badge amber + close/exit btn icon_only

content.lesson_type_badge: overline badge — Video / Reading / Code Challenge
content.title: typography.scale.section_md charcoal

hints_section.toggle_btn: ghost_light btn sm with ChevronDown icon — 'Show Hint (1 of 3)'
hints_section.revealed_hint: card on_dark bg rgba(0,140,76,0.07) border primary light, body_sm
hints_section.solution_toggle: warning badge btn — 'Reveal Solution' — only shown after 3 hints used

bottom_nav.right: primary btn 'Next Lesson →' or 'Complete & Continue →' on last lesson of module
bottom_nav.complete_state: primary btn becomes amber btn when marking complete, then back to primary for Next

top_bar.file_tabs: body_xs on_dark_muted, active tab has rgba(247,234,203,0.1) bg + 2px green_mint bottom border
top_bar.right_actions: Reset icon_only btn on_dark + Run btn primary sm

states.idle: on_dark_dim italic body_xs — 'Run your code to see output'
states.success: success badge 'All tests passed' + output lines in #52dda0 monospace
states.error: danger badge 'Error' + error message in #ff6b6b monospace
states.test_cases: per-test row: pass (✓ mint) / fail (✗ red) + test name + expected/actual

completion_celebration.overlay: brief 600ms burst animation — mint particles + '+XP' number flies up in Playfair amber
completion_celebration.toast: bottom-right toast card on_dark — amber XP badge + 'Lesson Complete!' + 'Next: [title]' link

code_challenge.description: Standalone challenge page, same split layout as lesson_view but challenge-optimized.

header.center: difficulty badge + XP reward amber pill
header.right: timer (if timed) in amber + submit btn primary sm

prompt_tab.objective_box: card info variant — 'Your Goal:' overline + objective body_md
prompt_tab.xp_reward: large amber stat_number + 'XP on completion' label

test_row.pending_state: left border 3px solid rgba(27,35,29,0.15), bg transparent
test_row.label: label_sm — 'Test 1: Basic case'

submit_flow.run_btn: primary btn — changes to loading spinner state on click

all_pass_state.banner: full-width mint success banner + 'All 5 tests passed!'

submit_flow.claim_animation: XP number animates up in Playfair Display amber, confetti-style mint + amber particles

path_row.layout: icon 44px + meta col + progress bar right

streak_tracker.shows: current week 7-day grid + streak count + longest streak record

xp_level_progress.layout: level badge left + XP bar (with milestone dots) + next level right

recent_achievements.title: card_title + 'View All' link
recent_achievements.item: achievement icon 40px amber bg + title label_md + date body_xs muted

recommended_courses.title: card_title
recommended_courses.course_row: thumbnail 56×40 rounded-8 + title body_sm + difficulty badge + XP pill + Enroll btn secondary sm

activity_feed.title: card_title + filter tabs (All / Completed / XP / Achievements)
activity_feed.item: card.variants.activity — left border color by type

profile_header.layout: avatar left + info center + actions right
profile_header.name: typography.scale.section_md on_dark
profile_header.meta_row: join date + location + social links — body_xs on_dark_dim with Lucide icons
profile_header.badges_row: 3 most recent achievement badges 32px with tooltip
profile_header.actions_own: [Edit Profile btn ghost_dark sm] [Settings icon btn]
profile_header.actions_other: [Follow btn primary sm] [Message btn ghost_dark sm]

stats_strip.items: XP Total · Lessons Completed · Paths Finished · Certificates — Playfair stat_sm + overline label

credential_card.badge_image: 80px rounded-12, mint/green gradient bg with SVG icon
credential_card.verify_link: body_xs mint 'View on Solana Explorer →' with ExternalLink icon

completed_courses.course_row: thumbnail 48x36 + title label_md + completion date body_xs muted + completion badge success

right_col.public_toggle: card.variants.default — 'Profile Visibility' toggle switch (green when public)
right_col.share_profile: card.variants.default — copy link btn + social share btns

podium_card.shared: avatar md + name label_md + XP stat_sm display font + level badge

filter_bar.layout: tab group left + filter chips right
filter_bar.time_tabs: All Time / This Month / This Week — ghost_light btn group, active = primary filled
filter_bar.filter_chips: Course filter dropdown + Country filter dropdown

row.rank_col: Playfair Display 700 1rem charcoal, top-3 use colored badges
row.user_col: avatar sm + name label_md + handle body_xs muted
row.current_user_row: components.table.row_selected — left border primary, bg rgba(0,140,76,0.06)

rankings_table.load_more: ghost_light btn full-width 'Load More' at bottom

settings_nav.item: height 40px, padding 0 16px, borderRadius 6px, hover rgba(0,140,76,0.06), active rgba(0,140,76,0.1) text primary

profile_editing.avatar_upload: avatar xl + 'Change Photo' btn ghost_light sm + 'Remove' text link danger

sections.email: current email displayed + 'Change Email' btn secondary sm

connected_wallets.wallet_row: wallet icon + truncated address + 'Primary' badge success + 'Disconnect' btn danger sm

connected_accounts.provider_row: provider logo 24px + name label_md + connected status badge + 'Disconnect' btn

preferences.language_selector: dropdown component — EN / ES / PT with flag SVGs
preferences.theme_toggle: toggle switch row — Light / Dark (Dark = future feature, show as 'Coming Soon' badge)

notification_toggles.row_style: flex justify-between items-center border-bottom light padding 16px 0
notification_toggles.toggle: 36×20px pill, background #008c4c when on, rgba(27,35,29,0.2) when off

privacy_data.data_export: ghost_light btn 'Export My Data' + body_sm muted description

certificate_card.corner_ornaments: SVG geometric corner marks in rgba(247,234,203,0.15)
elements: Academy logo wordmark — Playfair Display on_dark + amber accent word
Recipient name — typography.scale.hero_xl on_dark Playfair (animates in)
Date row — calendar icon + formatted date — body_sm on_dark_dim
Bottom row: XP earned amber badge + difficulty badge + duration badge
Signature line — 'Superteam Academy' in Playfair italic on_dark_muted

on_chain_section.layout: two_column — nft details left, verification right

nft_details.title: label_md on_dark 'NFT Details'
rows: Mint Address — monospace body_xs on_dark_muted + copy icon btn

verification.verify_btn: primary btn 'View on Solana Explorer' + ExternalLink icon
verification.verify_note: body_xs on_dark_dim 'Independently verify this credential on-chain'

sharing_actions.download_btn: ghost_dark btn lg 'Download Certificate' + Download icon
